secrets.description: Base URL of the public block explorer — the canonical chain read source. The indexer reads <EXPLORER_API_URL>/<CHAIN_ID>/transactions and the browser confirms transactions through the relative /explorer-api/ proxy. Public infrastructure URL; when unset the indexer falls back to the platform-managed NODE_RPC_URL (which carries a default), so a normal deploy never lands with the chain read source set to 'none'.
Chain id segment used when addressing the explorer (…/<CHAIN_ID>/transactions). Public identifier.

Base URL of the Usernode node the indexer polls for on-chain transactions. FALLBACK read source, used only when EXPLORER_API_URL is unset. Platform-managed: inside the platform the deploy injects the real in-network node URL, overriding the default below; the default is the in-network host used for standalone deploys so the chain read source is never 'none'. Local-dev ignores this and uses the in-process mock ledger.
Wallet address that receives organization registration fees. Public address — not a secret.
Minimum registration fee (smallest on-chain unit) an organization must pay to become active.
Comma-separated platform-admin wallet addresses (fee waivers + admin dashboard). Public identifiers.

Wallet address that pay-to-unlock payments are sent to. Currently a test/mock-token network — set this to the real mainnet wallet to go live. Defaults to an internal testing placeholder so the deploy never blocks.
Whole-number token amount a viewer must pay once to permanently unlock the live results charts. Test-token price during the testing phase.
